use_cases: Guiding new users through initial product setup and configuration
Multi-step onboarding flows for user onboarding wizards
First-time user experience introduction with progress indication
Interactive product tours with click-through navigation
Welcome screens for SaaS applications requiring initial setup
ai_summary: A composite onboarding component designed to guide users through multi-step setup processes. Features a modern minimalist visual style with interactive click-reveal navigation and keyboard accessibility. The component integrates a flexible button system with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options, making it adaptable across various industries including SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms. Best suited for desktop and mobile experiences requiring user onboarding, product tours, or guided setup workflows.
